name: Av Neryah
bio: Av Neryah is a contemporary non-dual teacher who guides students toward direct awakening through a powerful and direct nondual system. Drawing from vast experience across various spiritual traditions, he is not aligned with any single lineage. He is the author of 'Liberation: A Spiritual Autobiography' (also published under the pen name SantataGamana), a comprehensive account of his journey toward spiritual liberation.
